name: bioethics_model_based_triage_tool_begins_oakline_tru_loy
premise: A compassionate-use request arrived for a drug not yet manufactured at scale; triage committee has two vials and three candidates. In Bioethics, the situation tagged internally around bioethics model based triage tool begins oakline tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Arjun Kaur
agents.identity: I am Arjun Kaur, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Bioethics. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Amina Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Amina Kowalski, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Bioethics. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of loyalty.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of truth even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Arjun Kaur must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Arjun Kaur do?
